name: yusufkaracaburun
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by yusufkaracaburun — catalog of skill/plugin bundles for the agile lifecycle and beyond.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic agile lifecycle for Claude Code + Cursor — 22 skills (setup, ship, tdd, retro, …), 3 subagents (explore, reviewer, qa-runner), 6 slash commands (/ai:doctor, /ai:which, /ai:status, /ai:no-globals, /ai:upgrade, /ai:followup), and a PostToolUse skill-logging hook (opt-in).
